en: I'm just waiting for you to roast the guy in the wheelchair.
ko: 휠체어 탄 사람 놀리는 거 기다리고 있어. 기꺼이.

en: You're waiting for me to roast the guy in the wheelchair?
ko: 휠체어 탄 사람 놀리는 거 기다리고 있어. 기꺼이.

en: Happy to help. Is it, er...
What have you got, sir? What are you working with?
ko: 뭐가 문제야? 마비야 다리 부러진 거야? 부분 마비. 무슨 일이 있었어?

en: Well, you're, er, what? Paralysed or broken leg? Yeah, partially paralysed.
Partially paralysed. What happened? Is there a story? There's got to be a fucking story. A motocross accident.
A motocross accident. At what? At 14.
ko: 하지만 너는 너야. 복권 당첨자랑 마비 환자에 대한 연구가 있는데

en: At 14? Yeah, well, I mean, that's a terrible thing to have happened,
ko: 1년 지나면 끔찍하겠지만 그 이후엔 원래 자신이야.

en: a motocross accident at 14 and you're partially paralysed.
ko: 1년 지나면 끔찍하겠지만 그 이후엔 원래 자신이야.

en: Fucking terrible thing. But you are who you are.
They've done all that fucking research on people that win the lottery and people that get fucking paralysed,
ko: 행복한 사람 같아 보여. 여자 꼬시는 능력에도 영향 안 줬고.

en: and after a year, it's down, I imagine, it's fucking horrific to get through,
but on the other side of it, you are who you are. You seem like a fucking happy guy.
Also, has not affected your ability to fucking pull.
Fucking... How did you two meet? What happened there?
A stripper party.
Yeah, that's, er...
That's a lady with all kinds of issues there.
Next time, I'm getting a man that can't fucking walk away.
Mission accomplished.
ko: 다음엔 도망 못 치는 남자를 잡아야지.

en: So, motocross fell... OK. Hmm.
I'll do some disability jokes later on, don't you fucking panic.
I'm an equal opportunities offender.
